valid.description: Whether the request matched an available item

info_item.description: The exact name of the matched item from the available list. Return 'NO_MATCH' when no match is found.

feedback_category.description: Parser guidance category for candidate feedback.

feedback.description: Short, high-level explanation that helps the candidate understand why a request failed or how to proceed next. Must not reveal any unreleased case findings.

suggested_item.description: Optional name of a closely related info item that could satisfy the candidate's intent when the original request is unavailable.
